steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
Vílur Strayfoot can be found somewhere in Clovengap. You should find Vílur Strayfoot.
Vílur Strayfoot can be found in Clovengap. You should escort Vílur Strayfoot to safety.
Vílur Strayfoot can be found in Clovengap. You should talk to Vílur Strayfoot now that he is safe again.
The Jewel of Maral can be found in Clovengap. You should collect the Jewel of Maral.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Maral to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver…
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
